title: Rich Roasted British Beef Pie
description: A hearty and flavorful pie featuring black treacle and roasted beef, served in a mason jar and inspired by Northern Irish cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt.
Add the cubed beef to the bowl and toss to coat with the flour mixture.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the beef until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and potato to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the black treacle and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spoon the beef and vegetable mixture into a mason jar and top with a piece of the puff pastry.
Crimp the edges of the pastry to seal the jar and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the mason jar on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
